CheckTitle: Ensure guest user access is restricted to their own directory objects
Description: Verifies that the guestUserRoleId in the authorization policy restricts guest users to limited access rather than the same access as member users.
Risk: If guest users have the same access as members, external users can enumerate all users, groups, and applications in your directory, facilitating reconnaissance for targeted attacks.

Remediation.Recommendation: Set guestUserRoleId to 2af84b1e-32c8-42b7-82bc-daa82404023b (restricted access) in the authorization policy.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
